zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏多
zh.content:
目前ETH/USD价格位于2108.25附近，略高于20日均线2102.26，显示短期内价格在均线支撑下存在小幅上行动能。全天价格波动不大，高低点分别为2112.04和2104.43，表明市场多空力量暂时均衡，短线呈现震荡整理格局。

MACD值为-0.32039608，位于零轴下方，表明整体趋势仍偏空，但下降动能减弱，若能突破零轴转正，将有助于趋势反转。RSI指标未提供，但结合价格与均线关系，短线仍有试探上行阻力的可能，需关注成交量配合变化。

关键支撑位可参考20日均线附近的2102一线，如跌破则可能测试2095-2090区间支撑。阻力位主要集中在2115-2120区域，若突破则可能向2125-2130迈进，形成短期上行突破。价格在关键点位附近容易震荡，交易需保持谨慎。

交易策略上，短线可在支撑位附近轻仓做多，止损可设在2100下方，突破阻力位可考虑加仓追涨。但若价格跌破关键支撑，需及时减仓或观望，防止承压回落风险。整体而言，短期震荡偏多，需密切关注价格与均线、阻力支撑的互动情况。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETH/USD is consolidating in a very tight intraday band around 2108, reflecting a market in balance after recent directional indecision. Price action has been confined between 2104 and 2112, highlighting compressed volatility and lack of strong conviction from either bulls or bears. Despite the flat short-term performance, the structure remains marginally constructive as price continues to hold above key short-term reference levels, suggesting stabilization rather than distribution.

From an indicator standpoint, the picture is mixed. Price is trading slightly above the SMA(20) at 2102.26, which supports a mild bullish bias in the short-term trend structure. However, the MACD reading of -0.32 signals weakening momentum and potential residual downside pressure. With RSI unavailable, momentum confirmation is incomplete, leaving traders reliant on price structure and moving averages for directional cues. Overall, signals point to consolidation rather than trend continuation.

Key support is established at 2104.43, aligning closely with the lower boundary of the current range, followed by stronger structural support near the SMA(20) around 2102. A breakdown below this zone could expose the 2095–2090 region. On the upside, immediate resistance is located at 2112.04, with a breakout potentially opening room toward 2120 and beyond if momentum expands convincingly.

In terms of trading approach, range-bound strategies remain most effective under current conditions. Buying near 2102–2104 with tight risk control below 2100 offers favorable asymmetry toward the upper range boundary. Conversely, short-term traders may look for rejection signals near 2112 for mean-reversion opportunities. A decisive breakout above resistance would shift bias toward continuation trades, while a breakdown under support would favor defensive positioning and short setups.
